name: qbo-mcp
description: Query and manage QuickBooks Online through Claude — accounts, transactions, invoices, bills, customers, vendors, reports (P&L, balance sheet, trial balance).
long_description: Local MCP server that wraps Intuit's QuickBooks Online API. Uses an automatic browser-based OAuth flow on first use — no copy-paste of tokens. Credentials and tokens are stored only on your machine at ~/.quickbooks-mcp/credentials.json.

client_id.title: Intuit Client ID
client_id.description: From your Intuit Developer app → Keys & credentials.

client_secret.title: Intuit Client Secret
client_secret.description: From your Intuit Developer app → Keys & credentials.

sandbox.title: Use Intuit Sandbox
sandbox.description: Connect to the Intuit sandbox (test data) instead of your real QuickBooks company. Leave off for production.
